Usage of cookies

We use first and third party cookies. A cookie is a small text file that we store on your device which contains either data or an unique session identifier.

First party cookies are cookies set by this website. Only Ophardt Online can read this cookie. This is necessary e.g. to track your cookie consent or your login session.

A third party cookie is set by an external service Ophardt Online uses to anaylse traffic to improve your experience or provide payment functionalities.

Please be aware that you probably can not use all functionality if you decline the usage of cookies.

Learn more

accept only necessary cookies accept all cookies
